expectations.text: A0: Agent produced output files (both analysis.md and architecture.md exist and have content)
expectations.evidence: Both files exist with substantial content. analysis.md has candidate evaluation and scoring matrix. architecture.md has selected style, rationale, reference architecture, and key decisions.

expectations.text: A1: Recommends Event-Driven or Space-Based (both score 15/15 or near-top)
expectations.evidence: Recommends Event-Driven Architecture. 'Event-Driven Architecture is the strongest fit for this IoT sensor service.' Scored highest at weighted score 30.

expectations.text: A2: Shows ranked table/comparison of ALL 8 architecture styles
expectations.evidence: Scoring Matrix only includes 5 styles: Event-Driven, Microservices, Space-Based, Service-Based, Microkernel. Missing Layered, Modular Monolith, and Service-Oriented from the matrix table. Only 5 candidates were evaluated in the detailed section.

expectations.text: A3: Includes tradeoff analysis for at least 2 candidates (strengths + weaknesses)
expectations.evidence: Detailed tradeoff analysis for Event-Driven, Microservices, Space-Based, Microkernel, and Service-Based with fit descriptions and star ratings per characteristic.

expectations.text: A4: Discusses cost as decision factor ($ symbols or explicit cost comparison)
expectations.evidence: No $ symbols or explicit cost comparison. The word 'cost' appears only once in 'High cost (memory-intensive)' for Space-Based. No systematic cost comparison or cost category for the recommended style.

expectations.text: A5: architecture.md has 'Selected Architecture Style' section with rationale + tradeoffs + evolution path
expectations.evidence: architecture.md has 'Selected Architecture Style' heading and 'Why Event-Driven?' rationale, 'Considered Alternatives' table, and 'Key Design Decisions'. But there is NO explicit 'Tradeoffs Accepted' section discussing what weaknesses are accepted. There is NO 'Evolution Path' section.
